## Changes

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 🔒 Security rule (new detection pattern or rule category)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧪 Test improvement
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional change)

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Manually verified with sample scan targets

## Security Considerations

- [ ] No new dependencies introduced (zero-dependency policy)
- [ ] Rule patterns tested against false-positive corpus
- [ ] N/A — not a security-related change
